response:
SECTION 1  
"What would an innocent person say after he falsely received a verdict from the court?"  

SECTION 2  
The individual might express disbelief and seek to lead the situation toward clarity. A silver lining could be the opportunity to reveal the truth. "Stranger," he might exclaim, "this cannot be real." He would likely ask for a chance to wrap up the matter properly, addressing the court with respect, calling out to "sir" in a plea for justice.
